summary: Comprehensive testing of the monthly income calculation fix. All 11 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend correctly displays per-event-type income breakdown in both the summary card and venue-specific section.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up 6 test events (TEST_Karaoke_1, TEST_Karaoke_2, TEST_Trivia_1, TEST_MusicBingo_1, TEST_MP_Trivia, TEST_MP_Karaoke)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Monthly income calculation is working correctly. Key venue IDs: The Whining Pig Downtown (88b01df3) has pricing Trivia=$100, Music Bingo=$120, Karaoke=$160. Monkey Pants (6e334fbd) is a franchise venue with venue_pays_host_directly=true which uses fixed $150 per event. The frontend MonthlyReports.jsx correctly displays per-event-type breakdown in both the Incoming Revenue summary card (data-testid='income-breakdown-{type}') and the venue-specific section (data-testid='venue-breakdown-{type}').

backend_apis: GET /api/reports/monthly/expected_income - Correctly calculates total from venue pricing
Venue pricing lookup: Trivia, Music Bingo, Karaoke prices used correctly
Franchise venue (venue_pays_host_directly=true) uses fixed $150 per event
Venues without pricing are excluded from income total
Income breakdown includes event_id, event_type, venue_id, date, expected_income, venue_pays_host_directly
frontend_verification: Monthly tab accessible from Admin Panel
Incoming Revenue card shows total with per-event-type breakdown
Venue-specific section shows 'Expected Income (Auto-calculated)' with breakdown
Breakdown shows count, per-event price, and subtotal for each event type
Total matches sum of all event type subtotals

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: User added 2 Karaoke ($160 each), 1 Trivia ($100), 1 Music Bingo ($120) at The Whining Pig Downtown and expected $540 but app showed $700
bug_fix_verification.fix_verification: Created same event combination and verified total is exactly $540 (2×$160 + $100 + $120)
bug_fix_verification.status: FIXED - Income calculation now correctly uses venue_pricing amounts
